zh.lifeSummary: 當William Harmon於1528年出生在英國瓦維其可爾塞頓 可爾德費爾德時，他的父親William Hugh Harmon24歲，母親Joyce Ridgley30歲。他於1557年與Ann Clayton在英國英格蘭薩默塞特福拉薩爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1583年在英國英格蘭薩默塞特享年55歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Harmon于1528年出生在英国瓦維其可爾塞頓 可爾德費爾德时，他的父亲William Hugh Harmon24岁，母亲Joyce Ridgley30岁。他于1557年与Ann Clayton在英国英格兰薩默塞特福拉薩爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1583年在英国英格兰薩默塞特享年55岁。

nameMeanings.name: Harmon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): from the Anglo-Norman French and Middle English personal name Herman, adopted from ancient Germanic Hariman, Her(e)man, composed of elements meaning ‘army’ + ‘man’.
Americanized form of German   Harmann   or   Hermann  . Compare   Harman  .

variants.name: Harmond
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Harmon  .

variants.name: Hargadon
meanings: Irish (Sligo): Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hArgadáin ‘descendant of Argadán’, a personal name from a diminutive of argad ‘silver’. In Galway the traditional form O'Hargadan has tended to be replaced by Hardeman, and elsewhere in Ireland by Harman and Harmon .

variants.name: Harmony
meanings: Variant of   Harmon  , a surname of German origin.
English: unexplained. This surname is very rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

en.lifeSummary: When William Harmon was born in 1528, in Sutton Coldfield, Warwickshire, England, his father, William Hugh Harmon, was 24 and his mother, Joyce Ridgley, was 30. He married Ann Clayton in 1557, in Wraxall, Somerset, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. He died in 1583, in Somerset, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 55.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Harmon est né en 1528, à Sutton Coldfield, Warwickshire, Angleterre, son père, William Hugh Harmon, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Joyce Ridgley, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Ann Clayton en 1557, à Wraxall, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé en 1583, à Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 55 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Harmon 1528 in Sutton Coldfield, Warwickshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Hugh Harmon 24 und seine Mutter Joyce Ridgley 30. Er hat 1557 in Wraxall, Somerset, England, United Kingdom Ann Clayton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Er starb 1583 im Alter von 55 Jahren in Somerset, England, United Kingdom.

Morì nel 1583, nel Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 55 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: William Harmon(이)가 1528년 영국 워윅실르 수턴 콜드필드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Hugh Harmon(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Joyce Ridgley(은)는 30세였다. 그는 1557년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 라스알에서 Ann Clayton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1583년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트에서 55세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Harmon родился в 1528 г. в местности суттон колдфиелд, варвиккшир, Англия, его отцу по имени William Hugh Harmon было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Joyce Ridgley, 30.
